Premium Grade, High Version
 Dior Handbag Set ❤ "Calfskin Black"
This Lady Dior handbag is crafted from wine red patent calfskin, featuring the iconic diamond quilting and a removable "D.I.O.R." charm. It comes with a removable chain shoulder strap, as well as a removable card holder and zippered pouch, making it versatile for different uses. This handbag is eye-catching and can be paired with other items from the same collection.
"D.I.O.R." Charm
1 Spacious Interior Compartment
1 Slip Pocket

Removable Chain Strap: 120 cm
Dimensions: 21.5 x 11.5 x 3 cm
Model: 6612
Fits 1 iPhone 11 Pro

items.name_cn:
Premium Grade, High Version
Small Size Denim Blue Toujours Denim Series. I was drawn to this bag; it reimagines the classic letter pattern with an irregular stone-washed effect, giving the bag a fresh style. The gradient effect is unique and cool, and the denim print shows off a fashionable charm that looks both premium and visually striking. The extra-large capacity design fully meets daily travel needs, is stylish and versatile, and full of vintage vibes.
Model: 2822
Size: 23*15*15cm

items.name_cn:
Premium Grade, High Version
Medium Size 💙 Dior Toujours Denim Blue Fabric Handbag
This Dior Toujours handbag is casual, practical, and unique. Crafted from blue Denim Dior Oblique jacquard fabric, it reimagines the Dior classic pattern with an irregular stone-washed effect, showcasing modern charm. The spacious interior compartment features a matching pouch for orderly storage of daily essentials. It features a fine leather drawstring closure for secure storage and a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp, with adjustable sides to enhance style. The medium size features a leather handle with adjustable details, allowing for hand-carry or shoulder-wear.
Double Closure: Fine drawstring and Christian Dior Paris drawstring with CD Lock clasp
D.I.O.R. Charm
Removable Interior Pouch
Adjustable Leather Handle
Model: 2821
Dimensions: 28.5 x 21.5 x 17 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 2 wallets, 1 phone, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_cn:
Premium Grade, High Version
Diorstar ❤ Hobo Chain Bag "Denim Blue"
This Diorstar Hobo chain bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Spring/Summer Ready-to-Wear collection, featuring a fashionable design and practicality. Crafted from jacquard fabric with a blue Oblique print, it has a soft silhouette with a spacious compartment. It features a zippered closure with a circular charm engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo and the classic Dior star, and is accented with exquisite CD rivets on the side for added style. The interior features suede leather lining with card slots. It comes with an adjustable CD chain shoulder strap with a leather strap for comfort when worn on the shoulder.
Zippered closure with circular charm engraved with Christian Dior Paris logo and star
1 Compartment
1 Slip Pocket
4 Card Slots
Leather and Gold-Finish Metal Chain Adjustable Shoulder Strap
Model: 3202
Dimensions: 28.5 x 14.5 x 10 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 phone, 2 card holders, and sunglasses

items.name_cn:
Top-tier replica, complete packaging
DIO.R Oblique Backpack#
This is a DIO.R Oblique backpack that can be a couple's style
Based on the Monogram, it also features small metal logos, looking soft and cute. The canvas material is very lightweight, large capacity, light weight, practical and stylish. I'll keep this one for now, anyway my wallet is empty.
The iconic oblique vintage print pattern has been integrated into everyone's trendy attitude. Carrying monogram items makes you look like you're at Paris Fashion Week wherever you go.
Whoever wears it is stylish. Let's get a couple's style✌︎✌︎✌︎

items.name_cn:
Top-tier replica, complete packaging
❤️❤️RIDER Backpack❤️❤️
Black Oversized Oblique Print
This Rider backpack features a simple style and a classic academic look full of vitality. Crafted from black oversized Oblique print fabric, it reinterprets the classic Dior pattern with smooth calfskin details and a front Dior logo to elevate the look. Continuing the classic design, it features exquisite details such as a double-zipper closure, a large front zip pocket, and an adjustable padded shoulder strap, making it an ideal choice for daily outfits.
Black Oversized Oblique Print
Front metal-plated brass Dior logo
Interior embossed with Dior logo
Double-zipper closure
Adjustable padded shoulder strap
Leather top handle
Back of bag reinforced with quilted technical knit fabric, embossed with Dior logo
Dimensions: 30 x 42 x 15 cm (L x H x W)
Code: 5410

Crafted from beige and black oversized Oblique print fabric, it reinterprets the classic Dior pattern with smooth calfskin details and a front Dior logo to elevate the look. Continuing the classic design, it features exquisite details such as a double-zipper closure, a large front zip pocket, and an adjustable padded shoulder strap, making it an ideal choice for daily outfits.
Beige and Black Oversized Oblique Print
Front metal-plated brass Dior logo
Interior embossed with Dior logo
Double-zipper closure
Adjustable padded shoulder strap
Leather top handle
Back of bag reinforced with quilted technical knit fabric, embossed with Dior logo
Dimensions: 30 x 42 x 15 cm (L x H x W)
Code: 5410
